recommendations.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
recommendations.overview: The Herdman kids are undeniably the worst kids in the history of the world. They lie, steal, cheat, bully and overall terrorize their small community. But this Christmas, they're taking over their local church Pageant – and they just might unwittingl

recommendations.title: The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar
recommendations.overview: A rich man learns about a guru who can see without using his eyes. He sets out to master the skill in order to cheat at gambling.

recommendations.title: The Skeleton Twins
recommendations.overview: Estranged twins Maggie and Milo coincidentally cheat death on the same day, prompting them to reunite and confront the reasons their lives went so wrong. As the twins' reunion reinvigorates them, they realize the key to fixing their lives may just li

recommendations.title: Woman in Gold
recommendations.overview: Maria Altmann, an octogenarian Jewish refugee, takes on the government to recover artwork she believes rightfully belongs to her family.

recommendations.title: 68 Kill
recommendations.overview: Chip's problem is that he can't say no to beautiful women. This weakness gets him into a world of trouble when he agrees to help his girlfriend steal $68,000.

recommendations.title: Unbreakable
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man makes an extraordinary discovery when a train accident leaves his fellow passengers dead — and him unscathed. The answer to this mystery could lie with the mysterious Elijah Price, a man who suffers from a disease that renders his bon

recommendations.title: When I'm Young
recommendations.overview: 70-year-old Malena gets a second chance at life when she magically turns into her 22-year-old self. Now, posing as "Maria" to hide her true identity, she becomes the lead singer of her grandson's band and tries to recover her dream of singing, which

recommendations.title: The Flowers of War
recommendations.overview: A Westerner finds refuge with a group of women in a church during Japan's rape of Nanking in 1937. Posing as a priest, he attempts to lead the women to safety.

recommendations.title: Sick of Myself
recommendations.overview: Increasingly overshadowed by her boyfriend's recent rise to fame as a contemporary artist creating sculptures from stolen furniture, Signe hatches a vicious plan to reclaim her rightfully deserved attention within the milieu of Oslo's cultural elite.

recommendations.title: Same Kind of Different as Me
recommendations.overview: International art dealer Ron Hall must befriend a dangerous homeless man in order to save his struggling marriage to his wife, a woman whose dreams will lead all three of them on the journey of their lives.
